title: v0.3 TS-2 — Hooks
text:
<content>
v0.3 ships zero new hook events. 6 v0.2 hooks carry forward; two gain v0.3 responsibilities.
SessionStart: v0.2 retention sweep, lazy migration (DD-080 retired in v0.3 per DD-118). v0.3 adds NFR-COMPAT-N4 version refusal — read .claude/coherence/version.json#schema_version; if absent or < 3, emit refusal: 'cohrence v0.3 does not migrate from earlier major versions; remove .claude/coherence/ or run on a fresh project'. Clean exit, not exception; degradedMode does not engage.
PostToolUse: v0.2 drift-buffer, signal detector, telemetry. v0.3 adds scope-cache consultation — resolve scope chain via src/state/scope/resolver; cache hit → use; miss → walk + populate (FR-SCOPE-1/4). NFR-PERF-1 (50ms p95) holds; cold-start amortised by FR-SCOPE-4.
UserPromptSubmit, SubagentStop, Stop, PreCompact: unchanged in v0.3. Author Planner stays env-gated default OFF per DD-104.
Exception-guard contract: all handlers wrapped via withExceptionGuard. v0.3 SessionStart refusal is clean exit, NOT exception; degradedMode reserved for runtime exception threshold breaches.
Audit follow-up 2026-05-10 C1 fix: 'degradedMode pattern (DD-077)' citation incorrect. DD-077 = file-creation detector threshold; degradedMode = src/hooks/degradedMode.ts (v0.1-era exception-budget pattern, no DD allocation). v0.3 SessionStart refusal does not engage degradedMode.
Host capability probe (NFR-SECURITY-N3, DD-113) G3 fill: src/types/index.ts HostCapabilities interface (v0.2 P10) closed-schema contract. v0.3 reads via src/hooks/hostCapabilities.ts (existing v0.2). No new probes. v0.2 fields all carry: dual-shape parser fallback (P1) — absence of tool_name triggers legacy-flat-shape parser; terminal hyperlinks graceful degrade to OSC 52 then plain. min_claude_code_version stays 2.0.0 unless M0 finds v0.3 needs newer host API. Required missing → fail-loud (degradedMode catches after threshold). Optional missing → degrades feature.
</content>
